action_instruction: Reviewing the newest post at the top of the feed
intent: PRIMARY: wait briefly while staying on the Home feed with the newest (top) post visible
rationale: The newest post is already visible at the top of the Home feed (Kane Logger, just now, with an image and “+20 points”), so we can mark the review step as complete before running the required checkpoint analyzes.

action_instruction: Verifying the newest Home feed post has an image element with a present, non-empty src attribute
intent: PRIMARY: In the newest (topmost) Home feed post, verify an image element exists and its src attribute is present and non-empty. Return only true or false. | HINTS: top post card by "Kane Logger" with a large photo.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: In the newest (topmost) Home feed post, verify an image element exists and its src attribute is present and non-empty. Return only true or false. | HINTS: top post card by "Kane Logger" with a large photo.

action_instruction: Checking whether the newest (topmost) Home feed post shows the text "+20 points".
intent: PRIMARY: Is the text "+20 points" visible in the newest (topmost) Home feed post? Return only true or false. | HINTS: top post card by "Kane Logger", near the activity label "Gym" under the photo.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: Is the text "+20 points" visible in the newest (topmost) Home feed post? Return only true or false. | HINTS: top post card by "Kane Logger", near the activity label "Gym" under the photo.

assertion_tree.description: Verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points".

sub_results.description: In the new feed post, an image element exists and its src attribute is present and non-empty.
The new feed post displays the text "+20 points".

action_instruction: Verifying whether the top Home feed post shows a "points" label below the large image.
intent: PRIMARY: a Home feed post shows a “points” label | HINTS: below the large image in the top post Always answer true/false, nothing else.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: a Home feed post shows a “points” label | HINTS: below the large image in the top post Always answer true/false, nothing else.

assertion_tree.description: On the Home feed, verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points".

sub_results.description: Final verification — confirm the objective is fully achieved

assertion_tree.verification: Verify task completed: On the Home feed, verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points".. A confirmation screen, success message, or completed state should be visible.
